app.title: Preduzetnik Helper
app.description: Testing FSD, Shadcn, Shared Library, and i18n

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email and password to access your account

errors.email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

register.title: Register
register.description: Create a new account to start tracking your business
register.name: Full Name
register.success: Registration successful! You can now log in.

clients.subtitle: Manage your business partners and clients.
clients.empty: No clients found. Start by adding one!

create.title: Add New Client
create.description: Add a new client to your list to issue invoices.

delete.title: Delete Client
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create New Invoice
create.description: Fill in the details to issue a new invoice.

delete.title: Delete Invoice
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The invoice will be permanently deleted.
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?

limits.subtitle: Track your 6M paušal and 8M VAT thresholds.

pausal.title: Paušal Limit (6M RSD)
pausal.description: Annual income limit for fixed-tax sole proprietors. Resets every calendar year.

vat.title: VAT Registration Limit (8M RSD)
vat.description: Domestic supply revenue over the last 365 days. Exceeding requires VAT registration.

info.pausal: Paušal limit: 6,000,000 RSD per calendar year (all invoices, any currency converted to RSD).
info.vat: VAT limit: 8,000,000 RSD over rolling 365 days (domestic supply invoices only).

bankAccounts.subtitle: Manage your bank accounts for invoicing.
bankAccounts.empty: No bank accounts yet. Add one to start issuing invoices.

create.title: Add Bank Account
create.description: Add a new bank account to use on invoices.

delete.title: Delete Bank Account
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{bankName}} ({{accountNumber}})? This action cannot be undone.
